name: Parapet Community: Advanced Pattern Detection
description: Deep CPI scanning and instruction padding anomaly detection.

rules.name: Deep CPI Chain Alert
rules.description: Alerts when transaction has unusually deep cross-program invocation chains (>5 levels)
rules.author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction contains unusually deep CPI chain (>5 levels)

metadata.comment: Deep CPI chains can hide malicious behavior in nested program calls

rules.name: Unknown Programs in CPIs
rules.description: Alerts when transaction invokes unknown programs via CPIs (not system/token programs)
rules.author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction calls unknown programs via CPIs

metadata.comment: Unknown programs in CPIs should be reviewed - could be malicious contracts

rules.name: High CPI Risk Score
rules.description: Blocks transactions with very high CPI risk scores (deep chains + unknown programs)
rules.author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction has very high CPI risk score - likely malicious

metadata.comment: Combination of deep CPIs and unknown programs indicates sophisticated attack

rules.name: Multiple Unknown Programs in CPIs
rules.description: Blocks when transaction invokes 3+ unknown programs via CPIs
rules.author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction invokes multiple unknown programs via CPIs

metadata.comment: Multiple unknown programs in CPIs is a red flag for complex attacks

rules.name: Block Extreme CPI Depth
rules.description: Block transactions with extremely deep CPI chains (depth score >80)
rules.author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Extreme CPI depth detected - likely obfuscation attempt

rules.name: Alert on Moderate CPI Depth
rules.description: Warn on transactions with moderately deep CPI chains (depth score 50-80)
rules.author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ Moderate CPI depth detected - review transaction carefully

rules.name: Critical: Excessive Instruction Padding
rules.description: Blocks when instruction padding is excessive (high-confidence padding attack pattern).

rule.message: Transaction blocked: Instruction contains excessive padding ({{padding:max_padding_bytes}} bytes). This pattern is commonly used in padding attacks to bypass security checks.

rules.name: High: Repeated Padding Pattern Detected
rules.description: Blocks repeated padding byte patterns commonly used for obfuscation.

rule.message: Transaction blocked: Instruction contains repeated padding pattern (e.g., 0x00 or 0xFF bytes). This suggests a malicious attempt to hide or obfuscate instruction data.

rules.name: High: Suspicious Padding Ratio
rules.description: Blocks when padding ratio is suspiciously high relative to expected instruction size.

rule.message: Transaction blocked: Instruction padding ratio ({{padding:max_padding_ratio}}x) exceeds safe threshold. The instruction data is significantly larger than expected for its type.

rules.name: Medium: Multiple Instructions with Suspicious Padding
rules.description: Alerts when multiple instructions contain suspicious padding.

rule.message: Warning: Transaction contains {{padding:suspicious_instruction_count}} instructions with suspicious padding. Review the transaction details carefully before proceeding.

rules.name: Low: Single Instruction with Moderate Padding
rules.description: Advisory alert for moderate padding that may be legitimate but warrants review.

rule.message: Advisory: Instruction contains moderate padding ({{padding:max_padding_bytes}} bytes). This may be legitimate (e.g., Token-2022 extensions) but warrants review.
